capabilities.name: circuit_validation
capabilities.notes: Validate public circuit payloads before downstream workflows.

capabilities.name: circuit_analysis
capabilities.notes: Analyze validated circuits using documented API behavior.

capabilities.name: circuit_optimization
capabilities.notes: Optimization is trust-sensitive and proof-gated per docs posture.

capabilities.name: execution_routing
capabilities.notes: Bridge-aware routing for provider paths (Qiskit/IBM, Braket, PennyLane).

capabilities.name: quaternionic_su2_utilities
capabilities.notes: Quaternionic/SU(2) and geometry-native analysis concepts are documented.

capabilities.name: mcp_tooling_surface
capabilities.notes: Proposed MCP interface; not a production interface claim.

recommended_agent_rules: Use API Overview and Swagger UI to confirm routes and payloads.
Use public circuit boundary payload contracts before internal assumptions.
Separate production-supported behavior from research concepts.
Avoid overclaiming physical advantage without benchmark or output artifacts.
